name: AspNetUsers
notes: Queried by SignInManager.PasswordSignInAsync to validate credentials and check lockout state, and by UserManager.FindByNameAsync inside GetTokenAsync to load the user for role lookup.
LockoutEnabled, AccessFailedCount, and LockoutEnd are read/written by the Identity framework when lockoutOnFailure: true and a failed attempt is recorded.

name: AspNetUserRoles
notes: Queried via UserManager.GetRolesAsync to fetch all role names for the authenticated user.
Each role is embedded in the JWT as a ClaimTypes.Role claim — BlazorAdmin gates its UI on the 'Administrators' role.
